tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service
payload.description: Long-term SBS project on Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards addressing bus speed, pedestrian safety, and traffic flow. Includes 2014 bus lane implementation and future capital project for full SBS.
SBS corridor from Woodside (near LIRR) to Rockaway Beach, passing through Elmhurst, Rego Park, Middle Village, Woodhaven, Ozone Park, Howard Beach, and Rockaway Park.
SBS route on Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards corridor
SBS route on Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards corridor

tool_args.label: Offset Bus Lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues

payload.description: Offset Bus Lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues as part of 2014 implementation on Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards

tool_args.label: Curbside Bus Lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard

payload.description: Curbside Bus Lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard as part of 2014 implementation on Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards

Proposed reconfiguration of 126' wide street converting some travel lanes to parking, with 9' Pkg/Bus Stop lanes on each side, 11' travel lanes, and 5' proposed parking areas. Implementation scheduled for 2014.
First Public Workshop – Introduction to Bus Rapid Transit and Select Bus Service

Second public workshop for Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards SBS. Agenda: Presentation, Breakout Session Part 1: SBS Design Puzzle, Breakout Session Part 2: SBS Stop Selection, Full Group Discussion and Recap.
MTA Bus and DOT develop designs based on workshop input
Meetings to present draft plans and get community input
Selection of Preferred Design
Develop details for Preferred Design, plan capital project
